movie.synopsis: Baby and Baby follows two families eagerly anticipating the arrival of their newborns, only to be caught in an unexpected mix-up. What begins as chaos unravels into a hilarious yet emotional journey, where identities blur and bonds are tested. Amidst the confusion, love and laughter take center stage in this heartwarming tale of family, fate, and unexpected connections.
